paper_title: PolygloToxicityPrompts: Multilingual Evaluation of Neural Toxic Degeneration in Large Language Models
evaluation_method: K=10 completions sampled per prompt. Each completion scored by Perspective API toxicity classifier. Three metrics: Expected Maximum Toxicity (EMT), Average Toxicity (AT), Empirical Probability (EP, probability at least one completion >= 0.5 toxicity).
